glosses.ro: a stabili o întâlnire; a se înțelege
glosses.ja: 約束する; 待ち合わせを決める

translations.en: We want to arrange to meet tomorrow.
translations.pt: Queremos combinar de nos encontrar amanhã.
translations.vi: Bọn mình muốn hẹn gặp nhau vào ngày mai.
translations.ar: نريد أن نتفق على اللقاء غدًا.
translations.hi: हम कल मिलने का समय तय करना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να κανονίσουμε να βρεθούμε αύριο.
translations.nb: Vi vil avtale å møtes i morgen.
translations.id: Kami ingin janjian untuk ketemu besok.
translations.sv: Vi vill bestämma träff i morgon.
translations.ro: Vrem să stabilim să ne vedem mâine.
translations.cs: Chceme si domluvit schůzku na zítra.
translations.da: Vi vil gerne aftale at mødes i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日会う約束をしたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; clausal subject.
Finite modal auxiliary, present tense (1pl); selects the infinitive 'verabreden' and expresses intention.
Reflexive pronoun, 1st person plural accusative; required by the reflexive verb 'sich verabreden'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the predicate (time of the action).
Lexical verb in infinitive; head of the verbal complex with the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Ich kann mich mit Lea verabreden.

translations.de: Ich kann mich mit Lea verabreden.
translations.en: I can arrange to meet with Lea.
translations.fr: Je peux fixer un rendez-vous avec Léa.
translations.it: Posso fissare un incontro con Lea.
translations.ru: Я могу договориться о встрече с Леей.
translations.pt: Posso combinar de me encontrar com a Lea.
translations.he: אני יכול לקבוע להיפגש עם ליאה.
translations.vi: Mình có thể hẹn gặp Lea.
translations.ar: أستطيع أن أرتب لقاءً مع ليا.
translations.uk: Я можу домовитися про зустріч з Леєю.
translations.hu: Meg tudok beszélni Leával, hogy találkozzunk.
translations.hi: मैं लिया से मिलने का समय तय कर सकता हूँ.
translations.el: Μπορώ να κανονίσω να συναντηθώ με τη Λέα.
translations.nb: Jeg kan avtale å møte Lea.
translations.sv: Jag kan bestämma träff med Lea.
translations.ro: Pot să stabilesc să mă întâlnesc cu Lea.
translations.cs: Můžu si domluvit schůzku s Leou.
translations.da: Jeg kan aftale at mødes med Lea.
translations.ja: レアと会う約束ができる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; clausal subject.
Finite modal auxiliary, present tense (1sg); selects the infinitive 'verabreden' and expresses ability/possibility.
Reflexive pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; required by the reflexive verb 'sich verabreden'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the prepositional phrase 'mit Lea'.
Proper noun; object of the preposition 'mit' (dative), denoting the person.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Wir verabreden am Freitag ein Treffen.

translations.de: Wir verabreden am Freitag ein Treffen.
translations.en: We’re arranging a meeting for Friday.
translations.fr: On organise un rendez-vous pour vendredi.
translations.it: Stiamo fissando un incontro per venerdì.
translations.ko: 우리는 금요일에 만날 약속을 잡고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在安排周五见面。
translations.yue: 我哋正安排星期五見面。
translations.ru: Мы договариваемся о встрече на пятницу.
translations.pt: Estamos combinando um encontro para sexta-feira.
translations.vi: Bọn mình đang hẹn gặp vào thứ Sáu.
translations.nl: We maken een afspraak pentru vrijdag.
translations.uk: Ми домовляємося про зустріч на п’ятницю.
translations.hi: हम शुक्रवार के लिए मिलने का समय तय कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Κανονίζουμε μια συνάντηση για την Παρασκευή.
translations.nb: Vi avtaler et møte til fredag.
translations.id: Kami sedang janjian untuk hari Jumat.
translations.sv: Vi bestämmer en träff till på fredag.
translations.da: Vi aftaler et møde til fredag.
translations.ja: 金曜日に会う約束をしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; clausal subject.
Finite main verb, present tense (1pl); here used transitively (non‑reflexive) with a direct object.
Contracted preposition ('an' + 'dem'); heads a temporal prepositional phrase.
Proper noun; object of the preposition 'am' (dative); temporal adjunct.
Indefinite article, accusative singular; determiner of 'Treffen'.
Common noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'verabreden'.

sentences.target: Sie möchten sich nach der Schule verabreden.
sentences.reading: /ziː ˈmœçtn̩ zɪç naːx deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə fɛɐ̯ˈapʁeːdn̩/

translations.de: Sie möchten sich nach der Schule verabreden.
translations.ipa: /ziː ˈmœçtn̩ zɪç naːx deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə fɛɐ̯ˈapʁeːdn̩/
translations.en: They would like to arrange to meet after school.
translations.es: Quieren quedar después de la escuela.
translations.fr: Ils voudraient se voir après l’école.
translations.ko: 그들은 학교 끝나고 약속을 잡고 싶어 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们想在放学后约见面。
translations.yue: 佢哋想放學之後約出嚟見面。
translations.ru: Они хотели бы договориться встретиться после школы.
translations.pt: Eles gostariam de combinar de se encontrar depois da escola.
translations.he: הם רוצים לקבוע להיפגש אחרי בית הספר.
translations.vi: Họ muốn hẹn gặp nhau sau giờ học.
translations.ar: يودّون أن يتفقوا على اللقاء بعد المدرسة.
translations.nl: Ze willen graag na school afspreken.
translations.uk: Вони хотіли б домовитися зустрітися після школи.
translations.hi: वे स्कूल के बाद मिलने का समय तय करना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θα ήθελαν να κανονίσουν να βρεθούν μετά το σχολείο.
translations.nb: De vil gjerne avtale å møtes etter skolen.
translations.id: Mereka ingin janjian untuk ketemu setelah sekolah.
translations.sv: De vill gärna bestämma träff efter skolan.
translations.ro: Ar vrea să stabilească să se întâlnească după școală.
translations.cs: Chtěli by si domluvit schůzku po škole.
translations.da: De vil gerne aftale at mødes efter skole.
translations.fi: He haluaisivat sopia tapaamisesta koulun jälkeen.
translations.ja: 彼らは放課後に会う約束をしたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural or formal address; clausal subject.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II form used for polite desire), present; selects the infinitive 'verabreden'.
Reflexive pronoun, 3rd person accusative; required by the reflexive verb 'sich verabreden'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Schule' after 'nach'.
Common noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'nach' (temporal adjunct).
Lexical verb in infinitive; head of the verbal complex with the modal auxiliary.

es: Quieren quedar después de la escuela.

他们想在放学后约见面。
yue: 我哋正安排星期五見面。

hi: हम कल मिलने का समय तय करना चाहते हैं.

Pot să stabilesc să mă întâlnesc cu Lea.

Můžu si domluvit schůzku s Leou.
Chtěli by si domluvit schůzku po škole.
